$comment: Researcher handoff schema — structured state passed between stages via dispatch protocol.
Serialized as JSON in the dispatch stage output handoff field.
Hard limit: 8KB serialized. Soft warning: 7KB triggers overflow to vault file.
SERIALIZE — Orchestrator serializes handoff to JSON after each stage output.
If serialized size > 7KB, write coverage_assessment to vault file
DESERIALIZE — Orchestrator reads previous stage handoff, injects into next stage prompt.
SNAPSHOT — After each stage, orchestrator writes handoff copy to
Snapshots are diagnostic only — not consumed by the pipeline.

sub_questions.text: string — the sub-question (truncate to 80 chars + sq-N ref after first write)
hypotheses: string — testable prediction about what evidence will show (1-2 per sq, set by Planning)

$overflow_protocol.overflow_action: Write coverage_assessment to research/coverage-[dispatch].yaml, replace value with {"ref": "research/coverage-[dispatch].yaml"}. Next stage reads the file via context_files.
$overflow_protocol.sub_question_text_truncation: After first write, truncate text to first 80 chars. Full text preserved in Planning stage vault output.

$convergence_thresholds.$comment: Populated by Planning stage from rigor profile. Used by Research Loop for convergence evaluation.

$weighted_formula.status: provisional — calibrate after 5+ dispatches via telemetry
